subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My Glory! The letter of the honoured Afnán, Áqá Siyyid M.Y., and that of the latter Afnán, his eminence M.H [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامه جناب افنان آقا سید م ی و افنان آخر جناب م ح
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
